## ActionNamesFor type

Returns the action names for a given module. They are the namespaced actions.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ActionNamesFor<ModuleName extends XModuleName> = keyof ExtractActions<XModulesTree[ModuleName]>;
```
<b>References:</b> [XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md)<!-- -->, [ExtractActions](./x-components.extractactions.md)<!-- -->, [XModulesTree](./x-components.xmodulestree.md)
